THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DORFMAN, DEBORAH  (GUARDIAN) DORFMAN-RUBY  (MINOR), HARRIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUKKER, TATJANA $679.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $679.00, THE COURT AWARDS $179.00 IN MEDICAL BILLS AND $500.00 IN NONECONOMIC DAMAGES. DEFENDANT STEPHEN DUKKER IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE DUE TO LACK OF SERVICE. JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED AGAINST TATJANA DUKKER ONLY.
